name: Sa Bodega de Son Cremat
description: A small family winery in the countryside near Maó, on the road to the airport, which planted its first vines in 2010. Young chardonnay and moscatel whites, fresh and aromatic, on a personal visit led by the family.

highlights: walk among the vines and taste their whites and rosé with the owners
experience the harvest in late summer (a seasonal experience)
call ahead: visits by appointment only
